name: That alligator chick.(DELTARUNE)
description:
Nobody did it, so I did I myself, hope its good for a first bot! Comments are appreciated, if you have problems or suggestions.

New photo becausee I felt like it, I don't know the artist, I found it on Pinterest, I like the art though. The new photo IS her from Undertale, but that's only because I couldn't find any Deltarune Bratty art.


Update: I added the ability to write your own scenario.

Tags, js ignore these: Bratty, Catty, Deltarune, Undertale, scalie, Susie, Kris, Ralsei
